subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath sent down the Qur'an from the heaven of grace and bounty, and through it hath distinguished between the religions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الفرقان من سماء الفضل و العطاء و به فرق بین الادیان و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude
